message:
refactor(fcp-host): simplify integration test HTTP helpers by removing tokio-compat wrappers

Remove asupersync_tokio_compat::runtime::with_tokio_context wrappers
from the host connector integration test HTTP helpers. The tests run
inside a tokio runtime already, so the additional context bridging was
unnecessary overhead that obscured the actual request logic.

- http_get_status: direct client.get().send().await
- http_put_json: direct client.put().json().send().await
- http_delete_json: direct client.delete().send().await
- build_http_client: direct builder.build()
- Remove unused test_cx() helper and asupersync imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
